name: native-parallel-reasoner-rl
description: Self-distilled reinforcement learning for native parallel reasoning in language models
content:
## Native Parallel Reasoning via RL

### Core Concept

This skill implements techniques from paper arXiv:2512.07461 for improving agent reasoning, adaptation, and decision-making in complex tasks.

### Implementation

See paper for implementation details: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.07461

### Practical Guidance

Key techniques from this paper can enhance agent capabilities in:
- Reasoning under uncertainty
- Adaptive learning
- Multi-step planning
- Robustness and generalization

Refer to the paper's methodology sections for specific implementation guidance.
